__METADATA__.description: Modular tPM and CRMS Logic from V242

tPM_TRUSTED_PERSONALITY_MODULE.__DESC__: Logic enclave providing root-of-trust, key derivation, and deterministic π-based regeneration.

Capabilities.Lehmer_Compression: Permutation P -> Lehmer Code L (~1679 bits ≈ 210 bytes).

CRMS_COMPOSITE_ROTATIONAL_MODAL_SYSTEM.Description: Rotatable modal composite projecting effective configurations at runtime.
CRMS_COMPOSITE_ROTATIONAL_MODAL_SYSTEM.Rotation_Logic: R = uint256(BLAKE3(H_P || epoch || pi_window_hash)). index_i = R % n_i.
